title: Petrocoptis lagascae
taxonomy: Petrocoptis lagascae is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a rare and endemic plant that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. Petrocoptis lagascae is classified as a member of the genus Petrocoptis, which includes several other species of flowering plants. The genus Petrocoptis is part of the subfamily Rosoideae, which is a group of flowering plants that are commonly known as roses and their relatives. Petrocoptis lagascae is further classified as a member of the family Rosaceae, which is a family of flowering plants that includes a wide range of species including roses, apples, and pears.
